amendment.description: An amendment numbered 42 printed in Part B of House Report 119-628 to direct the Secretary of Agriculture to conduct studies in the U.S. Virgin Islands and Guam with, respectively, the Virgin Islands Department of Planning and Natural Resources and the Guam Department of Agriculture, on the development of aquaculture.

vote.text: On agreeing to the Moylan amendment (A025) Agreed to by voice vote.

action.text: House amendment agreed to: On agreeing to the Moylan amendment (A025) Agreed to by voice vote.
